VERIFICATION
Verification is intended to assist the Chocolatey moderators and community
in verifying that this package's contents are trustworthy.

Package: 3va
Version: 2.4.0

The binary distributed by this package is built by the upstream CI pipeline
(GitHub Actions) from the source code at:

  https://github.com/OdinoCano/3va

The canonical download location is the GitHub Release page:

  https://github.com/OdinoCano/3va/releases/tag/v2.4.0

File: 3va-v2.4.0-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip

1. Visit https://github.com/OdinoCano/3va/releases/download/v2.4.0/3va-v2.4.0-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip
2. Download the file.
3. Verify SHA256:
     PowerShell: (Get-FileHash '.\3va-v2.4.0-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip' -Algorithm SHA256).Hash
   Expected:    30aa420c2e12635122432d0591c22e26f1c136c40eb05754f1607c3f90e7dff0

The SHA256 is also published alongside each release asset as
  3va-v2.4.0-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip.sha256
at the same GitHub Releases URL.
